evals.prompt: Write an architecture guide for our microservices platform. We have 4 NestJS services (user, order, product, notification), PostgreSQL per service, Redis for caching, and RabbitMQ for events. Include Mermaid diagrams.
evals.expected_output: Architecture guide with service descriptions, communication patterns, data ownership, and diagrams

assertions.name: service_descriptions
assertions.description: Each of the 4 services described with its responsibility

assertions.name: communication_patterns
assertions.description: How services communicate (REST, events, shared nothing)

assertions.name: data_ownership
assertions.description: Which service owns which data

assertions.name: mermaid_diagrams
assertions.description: Architecture diagram and at least one sequence diagram

assertions.name: decision_rationale
assertions.description: Why microservices, why these boundaries

evals.prompt: Write a deployment runbook for our production release process. Steps: pre-deploy checks, database migration, blue-green deployment on ECS, smoke tests, and rollback procedure if something goes wrong.
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step runbook with commands, verification steps, rollback procedure, and emergency contacts

assertions.name: step_by_step
assertions.description: Numbered steps with specific commands to run

assertions.name: verification_steps
assertions.description: Health check or smoke test after each deployment step

assertions.name: rollback_procedure
assertions.description: Clear rollback steps if deployment fails

assertions.name: pre_deploy_checks
assertions.description: Checklist before starting deployment

assertions.name: emergency_contacts
assertions.description: Who to contact if things go wrong

evals.prompt: Write a developer onboarding guide for a new engineer joining our team. They'll be working on a NestJS + React monorepo. Cover: environment setup, codebase tour, key conventions, and their first task walkthrough.
evals.expected_output: Onboarding guide with setup, codebase orientation, conventions, and guided first contribution

assertions.name: environment_setup
assertions.description: Step-by-step local environment setup

assertions.name: codebase_tour
assertions.description: Overview of directory structure and key files

assertions.name: conventions
assertions.description: Coding conventions, commit format, PR process

assertions.name: first_task
assertions.description: Walkthrough of completing a simple first task

assertions.name: resources
assertions.description: Links to additional docs, Slack channels, and key contacts

evals.prompt: Write an ADR (Architecture Decision Record) for our decision to switch from REST to GraphQL for the frontend-backend API. Include: context, decision, consequences, and alternatives considered.
evals.expected_output: Structured ADR with status, context, decision rationale, and trade-offs

assertions.name: adr_format
assertions.description: Standard ADR format (Title, Status, Context, Decision, Consequences)

assertions.name: context
assertions.description: Why the decision was needed (what problem REST caused)

assertions.name: decision
assertions.description: Clear statement of what was decided

assertions.name: consequences
assertions.description: Positive and negative consequences listed

assertions.name: alternatives
assertions.description: Alternative approaches considered and why they were rejected

evals.prompt: Write a troubleshooting guide for common production issues. Cover: high memory usage, database connection pool exhaustion, slow API responses, failed background jobs, and 502 errors from the load balancer.
evals.expected_output: Troubleshooting guide with symptoms, diagnosis steps, and resolution for each issue

assertions.name: five_issues
assertions.description: All 5 production issues covered

assertions.name: symptoms
assertions.description: How to identify each issue (metrics, logs, alerts)

assertions.name: diagnosis
assertions.description: Step-by-step commands to diagnose root cause

assertions.name: resolution
assertions.description: How to fix each issue (immediate and permanent)

assertions.name: prevention
assertions.description: How to prevent recurrence of each issue
